## 更新内容

- 收窄「额度用尽」判定：仅识别 Grok free-usage 特征
  - `free-usage-exhausted`
  - `subscription:free-usage-exhausted`
  - `Included free usage has been exhausted`
- 不再用 `usage_limit_reached`、`quota exhausted` 等泛化文案判额度用尽，减少误禁用。

## 验证

- `go test ./... -count=1`

**完整变更记录**：https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/compare/v0.1.9...v0.1.10
